author: gb9t
content: Iter 78/79 result: drivers/md/dm-flakey.md (fault-injection target - dm-flakey.c ~709 + dm-delay.c ~470 + dm-zero.c ~81 + dm-linear.c ~234 + dm-stripe.c ~516; per-target FlakeyC + up/down interval cycle + DROP_WRITES/ERROR_WRITES/ERROR_READS/RANDOM corrupt modes + per-byte controlled corruption + xfstests transient-failure use case) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-vmenter.md (SVM vmenter asm stub - vmenter.S ~404 lines; __svm_vcpu_run ABI RDI=vcpu + host GPR push/pop + VMSAVE host_save + VMRUN with vmcb_pa + VMLOAD host_save + Spectre-v2 retpoline + IBRS save/restore + IBPB at vCPU-switch + CR2 round-trip + SEV-ES variant skips GPR-access). 108 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-multipath.md (multipath block target) + virt/kvm/x86-pmu-amd.md (AMD perfmon-v2 specific).
